calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Transfer To Sonoma County
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Case Transferred

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SONOMA COUNTY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2039 22nd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Patricia Cullinan (Trustee)

The sale was confirmed at $1,361,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on March 29, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,295,000.00 is required. Ms. Rasch to submit proposed order and bond.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of The Trust And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Patricia Cullinan (Trustee).

The Court noted that nobody is here to oppose the petition. Ms. Rasch stated that she has not heard from anyone, that Marilyn resigned as Co-Trustee, that Marilyn now resides in a facility and that she filed the resignation on Monday. Ms. Rasch also asked to revise the order to reflect the resignation (provided in open Court), stated that it is their intention to change venue to Sonoma as soon as the accounting is settled and that she would like to wait until after confirmation of the sale. The Court granted the Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of The Trust And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
